since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.27%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.13% · BTC +1.43% · Gold -0.57% · Nasdaq100 +0.00%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.27%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.27%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at -7.45%
cards.body: Leaders: META +6.53%, NVDA +2.70%, UEC +2.52%, SMCI +1.77%, BABA +1.75%. Laggards: RXRX -7.45%, S -5.28%, CRWD -5.14%, MDB -4.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.43% at $148.46
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
